race.comment: BOLLA BOLLA BABE (6) looks to kick off this prep the way she ended the last 14 months ago when she scored over 1100m at Mackay. Has a win and three placings at this journey from four starts. Should be in the finish. PULL THE CATCH (5) is putting together some solid results. Finished second at this track two starts back then scored by 1.75 lengths as favourite last time out over 800m at Nanango. Taking on a better line-up this time but she is up to the challenge. TARA I AM (7) had been racing well before she was safely held last time out when fifth over 1200m at Mackay. Drawn to stalk the leaders and should be involved in the finish. HONOURBEFORE GLORY (2) has won two of three when first-up and can run a big race while fresh.
